title: Concrete Sanitized Golden Fixture Admission
objective: Implement the smallest bounded follow-on after exactly one of packet 020g-a or 020g-b by admitting one concrete sanitized baseline-bearing golden fixture, its companion README, and fixture-specific tests under the packet-020f fixture contract, without broadening bridge routes, PM UI behavior, or schedule-write surfaces.
dependency_note: Packet 020h must execute after packet 020g-a. The admitted fixture and its tests must prove truthful deterministic baseline emission on the landed parser-reconciliation substrate and must not assume the abandoned 020g-b companion-JSON path.
constrained_outputs: One concrete sanitized baseline-bearing fixture admitted under apps/mutation-seam/app/schedule/fixtures with clear provenance and no client PII
One fixture README declaring live project id, baseline project id, matched task_code set, and declared negative cases
One focused fixture-specific test proving deterministic baseline emission and at least one declared negative case
validation_steps: Confirm the admitted fixture satisfies the packet-020f fixture contract, including required sections, declared negative cases, and non-overload invariants
Confirm the fixture-specific test proves deterministic baseline emission on the landed 020g-a substrate path
Confirm no bridge route, PM UI, SQL, or schedule-write changes are introduced
Confirm host disposition can move to host-validated only when the admitted fixture has been executed through the host runbook and baseline_events evidence is observable
sql_permission_note: Packet 020h is fixture admission only. No SQL, no bridge changes, no PM UI changes, and no write-surface expansion are authorized.
